flows.name: Login — Profile Auto-Assignment (single profile)
steps: UserController.Login(): if CurrentProfileId==0, call GetProfilesbyUserId(user.Id, user.CurrentCustomerId, null)
If exactly 1 profile returned → user.CurrentProfileId = profile.Id
User saved to DB via UpdateUser()
JWT includes this profileId in AccessTokenClaims.ProfileId
flows.note: Multi-profile users with CurrentProfileId==0 get NO auto-assignment. JWT carries 0. All downstream restriction checks bypass (see CONTRADICTION_001).

flows.name: Profile Switch
flows.trigger: User selects a different profile in UI (exact endpoint not yet found in search scope)
steps: Frontend calls endpoint (not yet located — likely a ProfileController or UserController action)
Server: CanUserAccessProfile(profileId, userId) checked
UpdateCurrentProfileByUser(profile, user) → User.CurrentProfileId updated in DB
New JWT must be issued: next RefreshAccessToken() reads updated User.CurrentProfileId from DB → new profileId in token
flows.note: There is NO immediate reissuance of JWT on profile switch — user continues with old profileId in JWT until token refresh.

flows.name: Refresh Token — Profile Context Propagation
steps: UserController.RefreshAccessToken() fetches User from DB by token.UserId
Calls GenerateAccessToken(user, user.CurrentCustomerId, user.CurrentProfileId)
user.CurrentProfileId is read from DB at this moment — carries any profile switch made since last token issuance
New JWT issued with current DB profileId
flows.note: Refresh is the synchronisation point between DB profile state and JWT profile claim.

flows.name: Capability Check (per request)
flows.trigger: Any service call that gates on a profile role
steps: Service receives profileId (from IWorkContext.CurrentProfileId or from domain entity e.g. SmsGroup.ProfileId)
PermissionService.DoesProfileHaveRole(profileId, roleName) called
Queries ProfileRoleMappings JOIN ProfileRoles WHERE ProfileId=@profileId
Returns bool — drives conditional logic (e.g. which address restriction, whether e-Boks allowed, whether voice allowed)

flows.name: Address Restriction Enforcement
flows.trigger: Any address lookup or broadcast dispatch
steps: GetAddressRestrictionForProfile(profileId) called
Evaluates: profileId==0? → NoAddressRestriction (BYPASS)
HasRole(HaveNoSendRestrictions)? → NoAddressRestriction
HasRole(UseMunicipalityPolList)? → MunicipalityPositiveListAddressRestriction (joins dbo.ProfilePosList...)
Default → PositiveListAddressRestriction (joins dbo.ProfilePositiveLists ON ProfileId=@profileId AND Kvhx=a.Kvhx)
flows.note: Profile's positive list data IS the geographic access boundary. This is the primary enforcement mechanism of the data partition.
